objective: Build a paired family-specific full-fallback AMR grader that can only report no-paid conformance or honest not-promotion
prefetch: Read existing promotion validator and incoming phase-bucket grader before designing paired trial schema
constraints: Family-specific correctness plus aggregate and median AIU
Invalid never becomes fail or win
acceptance_criteria: Current invalid canary is classified invalid-route and operational waste
model_tier_reason: Promotion statistics, correctness claims, cohort boundaries, and experimental interpretation require strongest review
escalation_triggers: Promotion math can pass mismatched/incomplete trials
